textByHashes.3aff4394db54c5b77aeaaaf5e613c474ec65d25c: Oh I wish I knew for sure... All I do know is that it opened seemingly by itself a few months ago. It was first discovered by the students over at the digsite, a few of which have gone down there but never returned.
textByHashes.bfd990c58e1b60080f43918a22b3d0a4c32d9831: They told me about it straight away.
textByHashes.bd02a4a5b6a9af63a65e4a6c793bbf277440853a: A few reasons, but I think the situation is beyond help now.
textByHashes.8f70a8bc4bcac28c54428679872e70cb3c34410d: I suppose it wouldn't hurt to tell you. I'm waiting to see my son Tolna. Don't suppose you've seen him?
textByHashes.59c4c7c4d052ab008381d330add683cd0e18211d: No. You see, I haven't seen him for... for... 25 years now. He just ran away one day and never returned. I'm hoping he's down this rift as I know he headed in this direction. My husband went to look, but he hasn't
textByHashes.75d28b43e5b06e2dfde05837387f9c2efc884d3a: You would do that? Oh thank you so much!
textByHashes.68eed8c60e0f13a9d97d94b3e714834617ba29b4: Thank you. You can use a rope to get into the rift, just attach it at the edge.
textByHashes.72e4d135e99395ee8f0f0739fa9a8f5624502ad3: How could you say such a thing? Get away from me!
textByHashes.0cf9fafc90270e8d236affd7991ac579abd0b034: Go into the rift beside me and find my husband and son!
textByHashes.58a344f1c5e153835f40572eb9f45c08bf27557d: My son! What did he say?
textByHashes.039c8a88dc46ca873615f9a5a10b09a51b1b0f36: Who can be surprised at his frustration?
textByHashes.55abd3ce3ad32f649166ec80de26dec371389e61: Don't waste any time, his life could depend on you.
textByHashes.05bed612c5528f125a48d165df7fc61173ef9f6e: But why? We're surviving perfectly fine on what we're earning.
textByHashes.69ccbebcaedb7848a71135a3b1618111318e63d8: What did he say? What did he say?
textByHashes.c027374fa18027f1a9d08775e8987a19f6b03578: You must save him! Help him get over his fear!
textByHashes.0882395340bedd2b5c5b3fc7bdd76e526a6b87ac: What are you waiting for? He must be so afraid in that place.
textByHashes.f508ba28ca9584d2f3ab59e24a0c9e18e143c499: You have to help him overcome his confusion!
textByHashes.912a865f42ba2963d9138cf816df161715a97a9f: Are you any closer to finding my son?
textByHashes.8b5c9cc00bf2153b3a0747d533aa05cc5c1aed5d: Oh my! What did he say?
textByHashes.9a2321703e39cabbb6eb15380acd344f44f352cd: You must fight to give him back his hope!
textByHashes.8af571ab5a441bc6a343d55a1a8b2a91411f9196: You must find him and bring him back to me. Please, I beg you.
textByHashes.a3b7ba680a3e0bd566c72360709f390ba41c06d2: What are you waiting for, bring him back to me!
